case_title: ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC. VS. HONG YANG et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT UNABLE TO HONG YANG FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT YANG, HONG AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-11-2012
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-02-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT UNABLE TO SERVE HONG YANG FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-02-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 395(B): VENUE OF PERSONAL, FAMILY OR HOUSEHOLD OBLIGATIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC.
